rationale: Educ. Code §11.055 governs ballot application procedures for school board trustee candidates. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: An application of a candidate for a place on the ballot must be filed not later than 5 p.m. of the 78th day before the date of the election.
_note: Rule text concerns school board candidate ballot access; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
